title: fix: remove exposed API key and gitignore temp/
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Securing the hive
gist.blurb: Cleaned up some temporary test files and updated our gitignore to keep the repository tidy and secure.
gist.summary: Removed a temporary test script and added the temp directory to .gitignore to prevent accidental commits of development files.
gist.impact: Improves repository security and keeps the codebase clean for contributors.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and Nomnom doing spring cleaning. Nomnom eating a glowing key (hiding the API key) while Polly sweeps up temporary files.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and the round tan Nomnom creature doing spring cleaning in a digital garden. Nomnom is happily eating a glowing golden key to keep it safe, while the bee sweeps up small pixelated text files. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
